headline_en: Frontier AI Works Overnight as Qwen Goes Open, But Success Rates Remain Zero
lede_en: Today’s AI landscape reveals a stark contrast: enterprises rush to deploy models like Claude Fable 5 for autonomous overnight work and embrace Alibaba’s open-sourced 2.4-trillion-parameter Qwen3.8, while behind the scenes, agent engineering tools like qwen-code undergo a flurry of stability and security fixes. Meanwhile, a sobering analysis warns that the AI frenzy has a 0% project success rate, underscoring that model capabilities alone cannot overcome poor implementation. The day highlights the widening gap between frontier ambition and operational maturity.

sections_en.title: Model Releases
sections_en.body: Alibaba open-sourced Qwen3.8, a massive 2.4-trillion-parameter model that immediately challenges the top tier, rivaling all but the latest Fable 5. This release significantly lowers barriers to frontier-level capabilities, letting researchers test the model on Alibaba’s platforms and potentially accelerating an open-weight ecosystem that competes with proprietary labs.

sections_en.title: Agent Engineering
sections_en.body: The qwen-code toolchain saw a rapid series of releases (v0.19.12-preview.0 through v0.20.1-preview) focused on operational hardening for autonomous coding agents. Improvements include better cold-start diagnostics, log rotation to prevent disk bloat, embedded review metadata for audit trails, multi-tenant security guards, and label-driven takeover control for autofix pipelines. These fixes address the real-world pain points of running AI-assisted coding at scale, demonstrating that robust agent engineering requires continuous investment in reliability, observability, and access control.

sections_en.title: Applications & Product
sections_en.body: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is being trusted by Cognition to handle unsupervised overnight workloads, a signal that advanced models are crossing the threshold of reliable autonomy. In parallel, new admin tools for Claude spend give enterprises budgetary control, and OpenAI bundles office tasks into ChatGPT Work, while a lightweight speech transcription library, transcribe.cpp, unifies ASR models under a single optimized backend. Yet a stark report warns that despite these advances, the broader AI frenzy has yielded zero successful projects in 18 months, pointing to systemic failures in software project management and governance rather than model capability. These narratives collide: the tools are getting better, but institutional readiness lags dangerously behind.

headline_zh: Qwen3.8 2.4T 参数开源发布，Claude 通宵自主编码破局，AI 狂热反噬决策机制
lede_zh: 今日 AI 领域多重变奏：通义千问 3.8 以 2.4 万亿参数开源，拉平开源与闭源模型的性能鸿沟；Cognition 公司利用 Claude 实现通宵无人值守编码，标志 AI 代理迈向自主工程；全球机构深陷 AI 狂热的警示则揭示，脱离实际需求的盲目投资正系统性瓦解组织决策效力。

sections_zh.title: 新模型发布：开源巨模再进化
sections_zh.body: 通义千问 3.8 模型以 2.4 万亿参数规模开源上线，旨在提供比肩前沿闭源模型的能力。其持续进化与快速预览机制，让开发者无需等待即可体验，有力推动 AI 应用生态的构建，标志着开源大模型在规模与实用性上再迈关键一步。

sections_zh.title: 自主 Agent 工程：从通宵编码到工具链成熟
sections_zh.body: Cognition 公司展示 Claude 可通宵自主完成复杂编码任务，解决了 AI 代理长时间运行的可靠性与稳定性核心痛点，使无人值守的自主开发成为现实。同时，Qwen Code 密集推出 5 个版本更新（v0.20.0 及多个夜间版本），重点优化守护进程日志、冷启动监控、会话归档及自动修复流程，系统性提升编码 Agent 的长期稳定性与可观测性，为自主代理的工程化落地夯实基础。

sections_zh.title: 应用落地：效能工具涌现与狂热陷阱
sections_zh.body: 应用层密集发布：企业成本管理功能助管理员精细监控 Claude 使用，防止意外支出；ChatGPT Work 集成建站、邮件与文档处理，成为一站式办公助手；transcribe.cpp 则凭借 ggml 高效推理集成 16 个 ASR 模型族，大幅降低跨平台语音转录的部署门槛。然而，同日的行业反思指出，多数 AI 项目因叠加企业薄弱执行能力与额外技术风险而失败，员工拒用、客户体验恶化等现象警示，脱离真实需求的 AI 投资正在反噬组织效率。
